---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Include examples of how it would work.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, describe them.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
